examples.title: Pseudocode: Reading Servlet Parameter
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ReadServletParameter
INPUT: HttpServletRequest request, String parameterName
OUTPUT: String parameterValue

BEGIN
 parameterValue = request.getParameter(parameterName)
 RETURN parameterValue
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates how to read a servlet parameter from HttpServletRequest.
